DevMessage.Name: Broken features and bugs
DevMessage.Description: I don't have time to test and update all the features after this update but if find any please report them.

Fixed.Name: for v0.4.0 update
Fixed.Description: The game updated and moved some parts of the code causing the menu to break

DevMessage.Name: Thank you
DevMessage.Description: I appreciate your patience for me to update this menu, and I apologize for the delay. I just lost interest in REPO and got busy with life, but I told you guys I would, and I hope I delivered on what you wanted.

DevMessage.Name: Small things
DevMessage.Description: I made a ton of small fixes and changes to improve the menu which are too tiny to mention here

Added.Name: Extraction Point Handler
Added.Description: Handler for extraction points that contains most code relating to them

Added.Name: Unlimited Death Head Energy
Added.Description: Lets you use your dead head forever

Added.Name: Steam ID Spoofer
Added.Description: Lets you change your steam ID

Added.Name: Open Profile
Added.Description: Opens their steam profile in your browser

Added.Name: Game Util
Added.Description: Contains commonly used functions, managers, and some methods used in tabs

Added.Name: Loot Manager Ignore Shop Items
Added.Description: Removes shop items from the possible teleportable items

Added.Name: Item Manager Value
Added.Description: Lets you change the value of spawned items

Added.Name: Kill No Enemy Orb
Added.Description: Lets you decide weather an enemy will drop a orb

Changed.Name: Nullable
Changed.Description: Enabled nullable to make it easier to spot possible errors

Changed.Name: No Clip
Changed.Description: Made it much better so now it doesn't slowly move down

Changed.Name: Theme Util
Changed.Description: Improved it a lot from how it was originally

Changed.Name: Managers and Enemy Tab
Changed.Description: Any that use lists are now cached

Changed.Name: NoAntiCharge
Changed.Description: Now named No Over Charge I believe I was tired when I coded it and messed up the name

Changed.Name: Loot Manager
Changed.Description: Recoded some of it, making it better overall

Changed.Name: Debug Mode
Changed.Description: Made a cheat class for it and moved its related code to it

Changed.Name: Heal
Changed.Description: Now it uses a new function which makes it possible to heal other players

Changed.Name: Teleport
Changed.Description: Now possible to teleport your localplayer even when not host

Changed.Name: Item Names
Changed.Description: Removes a bunch of junk like the map name from item strings

Changed.Name: Enemy Tab Enemy Spawn Names
Changed.Description: Now shows the enemy name and prefab name if they're different

Changed.Name: Non Enemy Targetable
Changed.Description: Made it much better by adding new harmony patches for enemy detection and include new enemies

Changed.Name: UI Util
Changed.Description: Made it much better by reusing code instead of duplicated methods for small changes

Fixed.Name: Unload
Fixed.Description: No longer unpatches all harmony patches and crashes on reinjection

Fixed.Name: Host Checks and Tags
Fixed.Description: Everything which required host should now have a tag and prevent you from using it if your not host

Fixed.Name: Name Spoofer
Fixed.Description: It didn't work before but now you have to use it before joining a game

Fixed.Name: Item Manager
Fixed.Description: It now gets all the items instead of just your current level

Fixed.Name: Is Talking
Fixed.Description: Broke during a update since playervoicechat was always null

Fixed.Name: Rainbow Suit
Fixed.Description: It stayed on even when disabled

Fixed.Name: No Gun Spread
Fixed.Description: Reverts when you change to a new gun

Fixed.Name: No Gun Cooldown
Fixed.Description: Reverts when you change to a new gun

Fixed.Name: Gun Bullet Amount
Fixed.Description: Reverts when you change to a new gun

Removed.Name: Invisibility
Removed.Description: I don't want to have to continue to update OnPhotonSerializeView every update. Might come back in future

Removed.Name: Alert Using REPOssessed
Removed.Description: I don't think its useful since you won't run into other players using the menu often

Removed.Name: Change All Colors
Removed.Description: Not possible since their new checks only allows for the owner of the player to do it

Removed.Name: Change Others Colors
Removed.Description: Not possible since their new checks only allows for the owner of the player to do it

Removed.Name: Object Queue
Removed.Description: I don't think its necessary on such a small game

Added.Name: Rainbow Suit
Added.Description: Makes your suit change like a rainbow

Added.Name: Safe Godmode
Added.Description: Allows you to take damage unless it'll kill you

Added.Name: Cart Teleports
Added.Description: Lets you teleport to a cart

Added.Name: Extraction Teleports
Added.Description: Lets you teleport to a extraction

Added.Name: Truck Teleport
Added.Description: Lets you teleport to a truck

Added.Name: Display REPOssessed Users
Added.Description: Lets you see other players using the menu

Added.Name: FPS Counter
Added.Description: Lets you see your games fps

Added.Name: Force Thief Punishment
Added.Description: Spawns exploding grenades by triggering thief punishment

Added.Name: Display Map Objects
Added.Description: Displays the total number of map objects

Added.Name: Display Death Heads
Added.Description: Displays the total number of death heads

Added.Name: Display Players
Added.Description: Displays the total number of players

Added.Name: Display Enemies
Added.Description: Displays the total number of enemies

Added.Name: Loot Manager
Added.Description: Lets you view and teleport items

Added.Name: Player Tab Steam Id
Added.Description: Lets you view their steam id

Added.Name: Player Tab Status
Added.Description: Lets you view if their alive or dead

Added.Name: Player Tab Max Health
Added.Description: Lets you view their max health

Added.Name: Player Tab Holding Item
Added.Description: Lets you view their held item

Added.Name: Player Tab Is Master Client
Added.Description: Lets you view if they have the master client

Added.Name: Player Tab REPOssessed User
Added.Description: Lets you view if their using the menu

Added.Name: Player Tab Crowned
Added.Description: Lets you view if they have the crown

Added.Name: Player Tab Chat Message
Added.Description: Sends a chat message as them

Added.Name: Player Tab Teleport Player To You
Player Tab Block RPCs
Added.Description: Blocks RPCs from being sent to you from them

Added.Name: Player Tab Chat Message All
Added.Description: Makes every player send a chat

Added.Name: Player Tab Chat Message Others
Added.Description: Makes every player excluding you send a chat

Added.Name: Player Tab Change All Colors
Added.Description: Changes the color of every players avatar

Added.Name: Player Tab Change Others Colors
Added.Description: Changes the color of every players avatar excluding you

Added.Name: Enemy Tab Perma Kill All
Added.Description: Re-kills enemies when they respawn making it permanent

Added.Name: Enemy Tab Teleport All Enemies
Added.Description: Teleports all enemies to the selected player

Added.Name: Enemy Tab Lure All
Added.Description: Lures all enemies to the selected player

Added.Name: Enemy Tab Health
Added.Description: Lets you view the enemy health

Added.Name: Enemy Tab Max Health
Added.Description: Lets you view the enemy max health

Added.Name: Enemy Tab Enemy Target
Added.Description: Lets you view the enemy target

Added.Name: Enemy Tab Perma Kill
Added.Description: Re-kills the enemy when they respawn making it premanent

Added.Name: Enemy Tab Lure
Added.Description: Lures the enemy to the selected player

Added.Name: Enemy Tab Teleport Enemy To Player
Added.Description: Teleports the enemy to the player

Added.Name: Enemy Tab Teleport Player To Enemy
Added.Description: Telports the player to the enemy

Added.Name: Enemy Tab Damage
Added.Description: Damages the enemy by the amount

Added.Name: Enemy Tab Heal
Added.Description: Heals the enemy by the amount

Added.Name: Enemy Tab Freeze
Added.Description: Freezes the enemy by the amount
